title: sisymbrium elongatum
intro: Sisymbrium elongatum, also known as Long-fruited Hedge Mustard, is a flowering plant species belonging to the mustard family (Brassicaceae). Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant effects. The health benefits of Sisymbrium elongatum include relieving respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as reducing inflammation and alleviating skin conditions like eczema. Sisymbrium elongatum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for its medicinal uses.
